---
title: "Example Files"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Example Files}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Full examples of .qmd and .Rtyp files are available 
[here](https://github.com/ggrothendieck/typMisc/tree/main/inst/examples) 
or via `examples_browser()` in R.
